LanguageData.Astra_RenderAdditionalBackgroundsStarsDe: Toggle to render many, many, MANY more procedurally generated background stars in the world view.
LanguageData.Astra_RenderNebulaeDesc: Toggle to render some potentially gorgeous procedurally generated nebulae in the world view.
LanguageData.Astra_RenderConstellationsDesc: Toggle to allow the rendering and interaction of constellations and their stars in the world view.
LanguageData.Astra_RenderBlackholesDesc: Toggle to render black holes in the world view. These are very rare, but that doesn't mean there can't be up to three at a time.
LanguageData.Astra_RenderPulsarsDesc: Toggle to render pulsars in the world view. These are also extremely rare.
LanguageData.Astra_RenderShootingStarsDesc: Toggle to render intermittent shooting stars in the world view.
LanguageData.Astra_OverrideVanillaSunDesc: Toggle to replace the vanilla sun with a procedurally generated star using realistic, yet random stellar data. All main sequence star types [O, B, A, F, G, K, M] are possible for generation.
